title: Couple
create_desc: Get a link and send it to your partner — they'll join in one click
join_desc: Your partner sent you a link — paste it here
join_form_desc: Your partner copied a link — paste it below
join_form_hint: You can paste the full link or just the token
share_desc: Send the link to your partner — they'll click it and automatically join. The link is valid for 72 hours.
partner_hint: Your partner can follow the link or paste it in the 'Join' field in their account
